content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — Push entitlement (App/DealAlerts.entitlements:5) is used with a scheduled hourly repeating notification (App/NotificationScheduler.swift:9-13) and metadata explicitly advertises "EVERY HOUR ... unlimited notifications, all day long" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:3), matching Apple's spam-push pattern.
Pierre: Apple explicitly disallows push notifications used for promotional spam or marketed as unlimited/high-frequency alerts, since this degrades the notification system for all users. Here the code schedules a non-user-initiated hourly repeating push and the store description brags about "unlimited" hourly deal alerts, which is a textbook 4.5.4-adjacent spam pattern reviewers flag under 4.5. Recommend making notifications opt-in/user-configurable (e.g., daily digest or user-set frequency) and removing "unlimited"/"every hour" language from the description.
